basics.description:
![Abstract Security](https://cybersecurity-excellence-awards.com/wp-content/uploads/163661.png)

# ABSTRACT SECURITY
**The Security Data Pipeline Platform.** Send detection-ready data straight into Microsoft Sentinel — normalized, enriched, and cost-optimized.

[abstract.security](https://abstract.security) · [Documentation](https://docs.abstractsecurity.app/docs/integrations/destination-integrations/azure-sentinel-destination/) · [Book a demo](https://abstract.security)

---
### Azure Sentinel — Destination Integration
Abstract **writes to** Microsoft Sentinel via the Azure Monitor Logs Ingestion API. This deployment provisions the **full stack**: a Log Analytics workspace, **Microsoft Sentinel**, a Data Collection Endpoint, a custom `_CL` table, a Data Collection Rule, and the RBAC the Abstract service principal needs on the DCR.

✓ One-click full ingestion stack  ✓ Least-privilege DCR roles  ✓ Outputs the exact modal fields

⚠️ **Before you start:** create an Entra **app registration** (with a client secret) for Abstract and have its *service principal object ID* ready — ARM cannot create app registrations. The Client ID / Client Secret / Tenant ID are entered in Abstract, not here.

When the deployment finishes, the **Outputs** tab gives you the **Data Collection Rule ID**, **Data Collection Endpoint URL**, and **Log Stream Name** for the Abstract modal.

elements.name: mode
elements.label: Log Analytics workspace
elements.toolTip: Create a fresh workspace (and enable Sentinel on it), or target an existing workspace in THIS resource group.

allowedValues.label: Use an existing workspace (in this resource group)

elements.name: workspaceNameNew
elements.label: New workspace name (leave empty to auto-generate)

constraints.validationMessage: 4-63 chars, letters/numbers/hyphens, or empty to auto-generate.

elements.name: workspaceNameExisting
elements.label: Existing workspace name
elements.toolTip: The exact name of an existing Log Analytics workspace in this resource group.

constraints.validationMessage: Enter the exact existing workspace name (4-63 chars).

elements.name: workspaceRetentionDays
elements.label: Workspace retention (days)
elements.toolTip: Applied when creating a new workspace.

elements.name: enableSentinel
elements.label: Enable Microsoft Sentinel on the new workspace

options.text: Make sure Microsoft Sentinel is already enabled on the existing workspace. This template does not change onboarding state for existing workspaces.

Creates a Data Collection Endpoint, a custom *_CL table, and a Data Collection Rule that routes Abstract's stream into the table. The DCR stream name becomes 'Custom-<table name>' — that exact value is your 'Log Stream Name' in Abstract. The default table schema is minimal (TimeGenerated, Message, AbstractEvent); to capture the full Abstract Common Schema, deploy via CLI with a tableColumns parameter built from Abstract's all_fields.json.

elements.name: customTableName
elements.label: Custom log table name
elements.toolTip: Must end in _CL. The Abstract 'Log Stream Name' will be Custom-<this value>.

constraints.validationMessage: Letters, numbers and underscores; must start with a letter and end with _CL (e.g. AbstractEventLogs_CL).
3-44 chars: letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores, periods.
3-64 chars: letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores, periods.

options.text: Abstract authenticates to Azure Monitor with an Entra app registration. ARM cannot create app registrations, so create the app + client secret first. Paste the app's SERVICE PRINCIPAL object ID below to have this template grant it Monitoring Metrics Publisher + Monitoring Contributor on the DCR. The Client ID, Client Secret and Tenant ID go into the Abstract modal directly.

elements.name: principalId
elements.label: Service principal object ID (for DCR role assignments)
elements.toolTip: Object ID of the Enterprise Application (service principal) for the Abstract app registration — NOT the Application (client) ID. Leave empty to assign the roles yourself later.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a GUID (the service principal OBJECT id) or empty.
